mapper.sql: s.id, s.goods_id, s.cust_id, s.sale_num, s.sale_price, s.sale_money, s.user_id, s.status, s.sale_time, s.create_time, s.update_time
mapper.insert: insert into sale_order ( goods_id, cust_id, sale_num, sale_price, sale_money, user_id, status, sale_time, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{goodsId}, #{custId}, #{saleNum}, #{salePrice}, #{saleMoney}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{saleTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update sale_order
goods_id = #{goodsId},
cust_id = #{custId},
sale_num = #{saleNum},
sale_price = #{salePrice},
sale_money = #{saleMoney},
status = #{status},
sale_time = #{saleTime},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT , g.goods_name AS goodsName, c.cust_name AS custName, AS userName FROM sale_order s LEFT JOIN goods g ON s.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN customer c ON s.cust_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
